sections.location: Fire alarms are located in the bedrooms downstairs, in the hallways, and outside the bedroom upstairs.
The water heater is located in the laundry room.
The circuit breaker is on the wall by the front door.
The water shut off is located in the front yard near the curb.
The HVAC vent downstairs is on the ceiling in the hall between the kitchen and living room. The HVAC vent upstairs is on the wall near the attic access.
The electric meter is located around the exterior of the home.
The upstairs thermostat is in the upstairs bedroom. The downstairs thermostat is on the wall near the back door.

tips.text:
Test smoke detectors at least once a month using the test button.

Change batteries when smoke detector beeps.
If a breaker trips, switch it fully OFF then back ON to reset.
Replace the filter every 60-90 days, or more often if you have pets.
